title: [kimi-review] 55c464d: [SEVERITY: medium] The commit message claims the RAK2287 int
description:
Commit: 55c464d46
Message: feat: break RAK2287 integration into sub-issues

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The commit message claims the RAK2287 integration was "broken into sub-issues," but the diff contains no issue data — only the `.beads/last-touched` pointer bump from `afbk.1.4` to `afbk.1.5`. If the beads issue database (e.g., `.beads/issues.jsonl` or equivalent) is meant to be version-controlled, the actual sub-issue definitions are missing from this commit and won't be reproducible from the repo. The pointer may now reference an issue (`afbk.1.5`) whose data was never committed.
